name: GeometryPoint.From
signature: GeometryPoint.From( x as number, y as number, optional z as nullable number, optional m as nullable number, optional srid as nullable number ) as record
description: Creates a record representing a geometric point from its constituent parts, such as X coordinate, Y coordinate, and if present, Z coordinate and measure (M). An optional spatial reference identifier (SRID) can be given if different from the default value (0).
